observation.messy_prompt:
Customer email: Need 10,000 units by day 12. Same ABS as last time. Can you do $0.20/unit?
Operator note: M4 sounded rough this afternoon; might need maintenance.
Inventory: ABS=220kg, Nylon=80kg, PP=40kg.
Machine log: M1 uptime=95%, M2 uptime=90%, M3 uptime=92%, M4 uptime=88%.
HR: operator O2 out sick one day this period.
Current jobs: J124 due day 3 med priority; J105 due day 5 med priority; J115 due day 5 med priority.

job_source.license: research code/dataset; verify upstream terms before redistribution
job_source.format: layout configuration JSON + order sequence CSV
job_source.note: layout JSON and order-sequence CSV normalized into storage-allocation and robot-scheduling jobs

mapping_profile.name: returns / kitting cells
mapping_profile.mapping_quality: plan-specific heuristic: order streams are constrained to fixture zones from this floor-plan backdrop

task_coverage.reason: local Taskset/LocalRuntime run has no deployed HUD taskset_id; rewards/traces are real, but platform task coverage requires hud sync/deployed tasksets

job_source.summary: Imported 311 SOAR order lines across 144 orders (SKU references and quantities drawn from real RAFS+SOAR+ARMBENCH orders), mapped to plan-0 (returns / kitting cells): 185 source zones, 11 stations, 3 route constraints, 4 job families, layout pressure 0.27.

provenance.license: public research dataset; verify upstream license before redistribution

intake.scenario_note: Imported 311 SOAR order lines across 144 orders (SKU references and quantities drawn from real RAFS+SOAR+ARMBENCH orders), mapped to plan-0 (returns / kitting cells): 185 source zones, 11 stations, 3 route constraints, 4 job families, layout pressure 0.27.
intake.scenario: Returns flow through inspect, re-pack, scrap, and restock zones with human-only benches.
